'''Losca''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who died on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. She gave [[M-3PO (Emtrey)|M-3PO]] his extremely useful scrounging program.<ref name="Gamble" />
